name: Ventus Response

declared_permissions.label: Ventus — module access (router, MDT APIs you already use)
Ventus — dispatcher (CAD board, assign/unassign units, force status)
Ventus — call taker (call centre / triage views)

changelog_convention: On every release: set current_version; set download_url to the matching ventus_response_module_v{version}.zip; prepend one object to changelog (newest first) with version, date (YYYY-MM-DD), artifact_type (complete or partial), artifact_url (same zip pattern), and changes — short, customer-ready bullets (plain language; no internal ticket IDs unless you want them).

changes: MDT / unit roster: fixed a case where reassigning one crew member could sign the whole unit off if duplicate crew entries existed for the same user; remaining crew stay signed on as expected.
Admin — system logs: added structured filters (callsign, division, who acted) and tidied the filter layout for faster auditing.
CAD / map: shorter tooltips on key actions, map pop-out behaviour, map settings tidy-up, Met Office forecast labelling and basemap layering rules, and small messaging UI wording fixes.
Permissions: dispatch vs call-taker access alignment; CAD and routing hardening.
Maintenance release — upload ventus_response_module_v0.0.3.zip before clients update.
Complete release package — upload full ventus_response_module_v0.0.2.zip to the repository before clients update.
